description_long: This house features a modern, rectilinear design with flat and low-pitched roofs, large glass windows, and a mix of open and enclosed spaces. The structure is surrounded by a low stone or concrete wall, enclosing a landscaped yard with several trees and a rectangular swimming pool. The main building is composed of multiple interconnected volumes, some with overhanging roofs and shaded patios. The exterior materials appear to be a combination of light-colored concrete, glass, and wood or tile roofing. There is a visible driveway or carport area, as well as outdoor seating and staircases leading to different levels. The overall layout emphasizes open sightlines, outdoor living, and integration with the surrounding garden.
description: A modern, multi-volume house with flat and low-pitched roofs, large glass windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and trees, all enclosed by a low wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade, large windows, central entry, and landscaped yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the pool, patio area, and the enclosed yard with a visible driveway or carport.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rear facade, more glass windows, and the garden area within the walled perimeter.
description_view_3: Angled view focusing on the pool, patio, and the relationship between the house volumes and the outdoor spaces.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with wide glass doors, steps, and a covered porch area integrated into the facade
